Security & Privacy

Please review these safety guidelines before starting with DevAI.

Safety Notice

DevAI can execute commands on your server. Even with safety checks (denylist, read-only mode, audit logs), errors can occur. Use with caution.

Data Control

Cloud Sync: Stores prompts + summaries securely.

Local-Only: History stays on this device.

Self-Hosted: Uses your own Supabase instance.

Tip: Use Read-Only Mode in settings for extra safety.

How can I assist you?

Your autonomous server intelligence is ready to assist with deployment, health, and optimization.

DevAI can provide advanced system insights. Verify critical actions.
